name: se-ranking
description: Connect Codex to live SE Ranking data plus ready-to-run SEO and AI-search skills.

interface.shortDescription: Live SEO & AI-search data plus ready-made workflows
interface.longDescription: SE Ranking MCP gives Codex direct access to 180+ SEO and GEO tools — keyword research, backlinks, domain and competitor analysis, website audits, SERP analysis, and AI search visibility across ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews — plus open-source SEO skills that turn the data into finished deliverables.
defaultPrompt: Use SE Ranking to find keyword ideas for [topic] in [country].
Use SE Ranking to compare backlinks for [my domain] and [competitor].
